since_last: 63% of 89 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +5.03%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 63% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.04% · BTC +2.55% · Gold +1.50% · Nasdaq100 -1.33%. 63% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +5.03%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +5.03%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -4.66%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: KLAC is the standout at -12.22%
cards.body: Leaders: APP +10.84%, CRWD +9.98%, META +9.79%, PLTR +9.37%, PATH +7.87%. Laggards: KLAC -12.22%, LRCX -11.55%, AMAT -11.23%, TER -11.11%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -6.51% at $159.73
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -6.51% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
